hero.subtitle: With the Land. With the Community. With Yourself.
hero.secondary: Close to everything, far from the ordinary
hero.bodyLine1: A sanctuary where architecture meets nature. Designed for a life in connection.

about.p1: San Miguel de Allende is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, internationally recognized for its colonial architecture, vibrant cultural scene, and year-round spring-like climate.
about.p2: Home to one of the largest expat communities in Mexico with sustained real estate appreciation, San Miguel combines historical richness with an exceptional quality of life.
about.p3: A destination where Mexican tradition and contemporary sophistication converge in perfect harmony.

project.heading: The Project
project.intro: Don Diego Club Residencial is a mixed-use development integrating four unique components around Presa La Cantera - built on the land of the former Hacienda de Don Diego, just 8 minutes from the historic center.

residencial.name: Club Residencial
residencial.description: 364 residences in a 100% pedestrian environment with clubhouse, restaurants, spa, sports, and world-class amenities.

farm.name: Organic Farm & Flowers
farm.description: Organic agriculture recovering the land's original farming heritage. Orchards, seasonal flowers, and greenhouse terraces.

wellness.name: Wellness Center
wellness.description: Rehabilitation center, active retirement, and senior living with a beach club facing Presa Allende.

presa.name: Presa de la Cantera
presa.description: Lakefront boardwalk, water park, nautical club, open-air amphitheater, and waterfront commercial spaces.

vision.body: A journey through the vision, setting, and components that shape this residential development in San Miguel de Allende.

servicesPage.heading: The Project
servicesPage.intro: Don Diego Club Residencial is built around four distinct components, united in a coherent vision of community and territory.
servicesPage.closing: Each component is designed from a clear premise: to create a residential environment that speaks to the soul of San Miguel de Allende, reinterpreted with contemporary sensitivity.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Answers to common questions about the development, investment, and services at Don Diego Club Residencial.

items.question: What is Don Diego Club Residencial and what are its components?
items.answer: It is a mixed-use residential development built around four components: Club Residencial (private residential core), Organic Farm & Flowers (productive landscape), Wellness Center (holistic wellbeing and senior living), and Presa de la Cantera (public–private waterfront destination).

items.question: Where is the development located?
items.answer: It is strategically located about 8 minutes from the historic center of San Miguel de Allende, on the Celaya – Dolores Hidalgo highway. It borders Presa Ignacio Allende and Presa La Cantera.

items.question: Is access to all components exclusive to residents?
items.answer: Club Residencial and Organic Farm are exclusive and prioritized for owners and residents. Presa de la Cantera is conceived as a destination open to the San Miguel community, blending nature and social life with cultural and recreational activities.

items.question: How does the productive side of 'Organic Farm & Flowers' work?
items.answer: It restores the land's farming vocation through organic agriculture and seasonal flower production. Beyond aesthetics, fresh products feed restaurants and daily life on the development, with organic gardens, greenhouses, and production fields linked by paths and bike lanes.

items.question: What is the pedestrian-focused urban design?
items.answer: The interior of the development is 100% pedestrian, keeping cars out of the inner streets. A peripheral road circuit at grade change handles vehicles, while parking is covered with direct pedestrian access to homes-two spaces per unit.

purchaseGuide.title: Your Don Diego purchase guide
purchaseGuide.intro: This guide is for anyone exploring a home at Don Diego in San Miguel de Allende. At the top, choose “International” (the default) for the usual path for buyers from the U.S., Canada, Europe, and Latin America, plus a short “your region” section—or choose “Local / Mexico” for the same journey described for buyers who already live in Mexico. It’s a helpful overview; your notary and lawyers still give the final word for your case.
purchaseGuide.disclaimerLead: Informational only. Not legal, tax, or investment advice.

hero.body: Connected to the vibrant heart of the city, yet sheltered in the tranquility of a natural sanctuary.

locationMexico.intro: More than a point on the map, San Miguel de Allende holds a unique place in the Mexican imagination: historic, creative, connected, and deeply linked to everyday life in central Mexico.
locationMexico.imageAlt: View of San Miguel de Allende and its geographic context
locationMexico.overlay: San Miguel de Allende holds a privileged position between heritage, landscape, and cultural connectivity.

bajio.title: In the heart of the Bajio
bajio.body: San Miguel de Allende is located in the state of Guanajuato, in a region of central Mexico known for its balance of cultural life, landscape, and connectivity.

humanScale.title: A human-scale city
humanScale.body: Its scale makes calm city living possible: historic architecture, walkable streets, residential neighborhoods, and a constant relationship with nature.

mexico.title: Deep and contemporary Mexico
mexico.body: San Miguel synthesizes the best of the country: heritage, design, gastronomy, creative community, and international sensitivity without losing local identity.

grid.intro: With a privileged location, you are surrounded by the region's main attractions while preserving countryside tranquility.

fabrica.title: Fabrica La Aurora
fabrica.description: An internationally recognized art and design center, housed in a beautiful industrial setting with dozens of galleries and studios.

centro.title: Historic Center
centro.description: The vibrant heart of the city, full of restaurants, galleries, exclusive shops, and all the culture that makes San Miguel famous.

mercados.title: Organic Markets
mercados.description: Direct connection with local producers. Fresh ingredients, artisan bread, and a community centered on wellbeing.

vinedos.title: Surrounding Vineyards
vinedos.description: Majestic fields and top-tier wineries. Sunset tastings in the extraordinary valleys of the region.

hero.headline: 364 residences between duplexes and apartments
hero.body: Intelligent density that protects views and privacy. Living landscape with gardens, fountains, and streams.

departamentos.title: Apartments
departamentos.description: Blocks around the residential complex: covered parking and lower-level storage create a circuit that keeps inner streets free of vehicle traffic. Four apartments per level with terraces and usable rooftops.

duplex1.title: Duplex Homes Type 1
duplex1.description: One home per level, each with terrace or interior patio and clear connection to the outdoors. Option to rent one bedroom independently.

duplex2.title: Duplex Homes Type 2
duplex2.description: Homes around an interior patio, one home per level. Type 2 connects pedestrian streets through the first level. Jacuzzi in selected prototypes.

duplex3.title: Duplex Homes Type 3
duplex3.description: Central patio with one home per level; layouts with multiple terraces and, in type B prototypes, a living lounge. Option to rent one bedroom independently.

amenities.intro: More than amenities, we create spaces for gathering, caring for yourself, and enjoying every day. Everything is designed for a full, connected, and meaningful way of life.

socialHeart.title: The Social Heart

wellness.title: Wellness and Relaxation
wellness.body: A calm sanctuary with heated pool, yoga studio, spa, and private jacuzzis among streams.

clubAccess.titleLine1: Being an owner means being part of the
clubAccess.subtitle: The club as a place for gathering and shared life
clubAccess.body: You do not just access spaces: you join a community of neighbors sharing the same environment, care, and pace of life. You participate in the club as someone who belongs-with voice, encounters, and an experience built together.

rentals.subtitle: A rental pool inside Club Residencial
rentals.body: Select development units available for short stays-bookings, calendar, and service standards coordinated by Don Diego Rentals. Owners delegate operations; guests experience the same club environment with professional support.

connectivity.sectionAria: Connectivity, common areas, community, and surroundings

shuttles.body: Transfers designed for Club residents: comfortable connection to the historic center and key city points-schedules and routes coordinated so your day moves smoothly.

wifi.body: Coverage designed so you can work, connect, and enjoy shared club spaces without interruptions-from the Clubhouse to pools, terraces, and social zones.

community.body: Don Diego brings together families and diverse profiles in a calm, safe environment: informal gatherings, shared routines, and a team that supports coexistence-so feeling at home goes beyond your residence.

nature.body: Lakes, vegetation, and paths for walking or biking within the development: a green pause between urban days, designed so each day ends with calm and perspective.
nature.imageAlt: Nature and landscapes at Don Diego

sustainability.body: Club Residencial is part of a master plan with environmental vision: common spaces, circulation, and landscape designed to coexist with water, land, and the project's organic production.

localesComerciales.description: Retail fronts integrated into the waterfront promenade, activating everyday life by the water.

anfiteatro.title: Open-air amphitheater
anfiteatro.description: An open stage for concerts, cinema, and community gatherings by the water: the cultural pulse of the waterfront.

gastronomiaLacustre.title: Waterfront gastronomy
gastronomiaLacustre.description: Terraces and food concepts by the water: the natural place to close the day or host visitors.

coworking.title: Coworking
coworking.description: Workspaces in the clubhouse to focus, meet, and blend productivity with the club environment.

barrasCafe.title: Coffee bars
barrasCafe.description: Coffee bars in the social heart of the club: pauses, informal meetings, and daily rhythm among neighbors.

salonYoga.title: Yoga studio
salonYoga.description: Dedicated yoga and movement space in a serene residential club setting.

jacuzzis.title: Private jacuzzis
jacuzzis.description: Jacuzzis among streams and landscape: moments of relaxation beyond the main pool.

shuttles.title: Shuttles to historic center
shuttles.description: Coordinated route between the club and downtown San Miguel for effortless mobility.

paseosHuertos.title: Orchard walks
paseosHuertos.description: Walkways through crop rows and beds to see daily orchard work and seasonal landscape changes up close.

cicloruta.title: Cycle route
cicloruta.description: Ride through the productive extension to connect with the natural process and farm rhythm.

invernaderos.title: Greenhouses and growing zones
invernaderos.description: Terraced greenhouses and organized crops with a sustainable approach and nearby origin.

programasEducativos.title: Farm education programs
programasEducativos.description: Workshops and community experiences around what is grown and harvested in the project.

floresTemporada.title: Seasonal flowers
floresTemporada.description: Floral production that marks seasons, aroma, and color in Don Diego common spaces.

rehabilitacion.title: Rehabilitation center
rehabilitacion.description: Specialized spaces for physical recovery and integral pain management with modern equipment.

seniorLiving.title: Senior Living
seniorLiving.description: Residences and services for an active supported life, with permanent community care.

hospedajeFamiliar.title: Family lodging
hospedajeFamiliar.description: Apartments designed so families can stay close during recovery processes or longer stays.

jardinesTerapeuticos.title: Therapeutic gardens
jardinesTerapeuticos.description: Green and leisure areas integrated with nature as part of the wellbeing program.

beachClub.title: Beach club by the reservoir
beachClub.description: Beach-style amenities at Presa Allende: a leisure and gathering pole by the water.

wifiAreasComunes.title: Wi-Fi in common areas
wifiAreasComunes.description: Connectivity across club and shared areas so you can work, meet, or share your day without losing connection.

chatPanel.emptyState: Start with one of these suggestions or ask anything about Don Diego.

errors.chatRequestFailed: Sorry, I could not process your request right now.

comingSoon.body: Discover a unique place in San Miguel de Allende, where nature and design meet to create an unforgettable experience.

emailCaptureDialog.title: Start Virtual Staging
emailCaptureDialog.description: Enter your email to edit the image.

emailGate.kicker: Enter your email to create images
emailGate.invalid: Enter a valid email to continue.

errors.generic: Could not generate the image. Please try again.
errors.dailyLimitReached: You reached your daily credit limit.
errors.VS_COULD_NOT_CREATE_USER: Could not create or retrieve your user.
errors.VS_DAILY_LIMIT_REACHED: You reached your daily credit limit.
errors.VS_FAILED_TO_FETCH_SOURCE_IMAGE: Could not fetch the source image.

rules.hardcodedSpanishSource: Current hardcoded UI copy is treated as Spanish source of truth.
rules.keepExistingEnglishBrandTerms: Keep existing English brand terms exactly as currently used across locales.
